title: elaeocarpus ovalis
intro: Elaeocarpus ovalis, also known as the small blueberry ash or blue olive tree, is a species of flowering plant in the Elaeocarpaceae family. The medicinal properties of Elaeocarpus ovalis include its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, particularly those related to the digestive system and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, skin irritations, and other conditions. Elaeocarpus ovalis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, and it is also used in some parts of the world as a food source, particularly for its edible berries.
